drafts.title: How do you go from Reddit threads to an actual build plan?
drafts.body: I've been collecting pain points from r/SaaS and keep losing context when I move to planning tools. Curious how others structure this workflow without endless spreadsheets.
drafts.riskNotes: Keep discussion pain-focused; avoid product links in top comment.

drafts.title: Building a browser extension to turn Reddit research into phased plans
drafts.body: I'm documenting the tradeoffs of DOM-first capture vs API access, and why I'm packaging outputs as implemento-style blueprints. Would love feedback on the methodology.
drafts.riskNotes: Disclose builder affiliation; follow r/SaaS self-promo norms.

drafts.title: Template pack: blueprint + phase 0 structure for Reddit-sourced product research
drafts.body: Sharing the markdown structure I use to go from pain themes to a phase 0 foundations plan. Free template; restrained mention of the tool I'm building.
drafts.riskNotes: Lead with the free resource; single disclosure line at end.
